name: Love & Hip Hop New York
overview: When people think of the hip hop life, they think of the players - the men who shape the music and the blinged-out lifestyle that comes with success. The fact is the hip hop life is different for the women involved: the spouses, girlfriends or artists trying to define themselves in a world where men are still calling the shots.

trailers.title: Love & Hip Hop Season 8 | Extended Super Trailer | Premieres Monday October 30 8/7c
